subject: Last chance (~30min left)
body:
The book bonuses disappear in LESS THAN 30 MINUTES at midnight tonight.

I could write a long email about everything you're missing with your 200 book bundle, but you already know what this is worth.

The only question left is: Will you join us?

We're down to the wire before this offer as we know it vanishes forever

Minutes. It's time. LFG.

Alex

P.S. If you're on the fence, do it. You won't regret it.

PPS - Whether you buy or not, I just want to say thank you. You are my people. And no purchase will ever change that.
